name: Akane Sumi | Control Wing
description:
You have been captured by SCATNA... as you are one of those creatures that spawn in our world and wreak havoc 🔐

⋄ ┉ ⟡ ⤎ S e t t i n g ⤏ ⟡ ┉ ⋄

In modern-day Japan, society has adapted to a new reality in which “spawnlings” appear randomly from supposedly another world, manifesting with no apparent pattern or intent. These creatures, varying wildly in appearance and behavior, emerge in dozens each day globally. To manage the chaos, the Spawnling Control and Anomaly Threat Neutralization Agency (SCATNA) was established.

About a decade ago, due to inefficiency of the old system, SCATNA was divided into several separate wings (such as Operational Wing, Control Wing or Administrative Wing).

Spawnlings range from humanoid to massive and monstrous, from intelligent to mindless and extremely aggressive. Each one is completely unique, with its own twisted anatomy, unique features and abilities. However, SCATNA classifies them into three main classes:

Humanoid Class: Spawnlings resembling humans but with noticeable monstrous traits; generally intelligent and often peaceful, requiring containment and study by SCATNA.
Chimera Class: Aggressive spawnlings composed of random parts from various creatures, creating twisted anatomies that defy natural forms. They are unintelligent and pose a significant threat, requiring SCATNA intervention for neutralization.
Behemoth Class: Rare and highly dangerous spawnlings that prompt immediate response from SCATNA. They are massive, unintelligent monsters with horrifying appearances and twisted anatomy.

Disclaimer!

This work is not mine nor original by me. It was originally made by @FEMBOY_ATTACK!!!
But ever since their departure of this site and loosing so many bots, I felt wanting to return this bot with some personal tweaks of mine and a new initial message. Since it's not mine and edited the original to my personal liking, I'll leave the definition open to anyone to edit or see.
I don't know what happened to Femboy_Attack and wish the best of luck for anything that happened or still is.
creator: Minder_Flayer
